title: More Features
description: A mod that adds new features.
body:
A mod for minecraft that adds new features to the game.

WARNING This is in beta so it does not have a lot of features and might have a lot of bugs! 

**Also, I Will Not Update This Until I Learn Something Else Than Mcreator, like all of java.**   
**UPDATE**: I have started learning how to code in java and this might be updated within the next **3 years**

This Was created by me ComputerGuy https://www.youtube.com/@computerguy7451/videos

Video on beta 1.1 https://youtu.be/ObNkxHE9GsA



Other:
Please tell me if I am accidentally copying someone else's mod.

source code https://github.com/ComputerGuy-github/More_Features_mod




Plan to add:
Amethyst tools,
Time Crystals,
Gui Improvements,

# List of things and what they do

### Items

Dirt Sword: Has 30 durability 3 attack damage 2 attack speed, no special properties

Dirt Pickaxe: Has 30 Durability can mine stone and is slower than wood, no special properties

Dirt Axe: Has 30 Durability 4 attack damage 1 attack speed(Plan to change) and is slower than wood, no special properties

Dirt Shovel: 30 Durability slower than wood, no special properties

Dirt Hoe: 30 Durability as fast as stone, no special properties


### Achievements

Thanks: Thanks for downloading!


### Other

RIGHT CTRL opens Menu That is a work in progress





## The Reason You Might Want To Download

I know It is not much right now but it adds new stuff that will improve your game.
